title: Maxicrop PPCGFYDL Complete Garden Feed, 500ML - All Purpose Fertiliser - with Seaweed Extract - for Strong Growth and Healthy Root Development - Plant Nutrition - Indoor and Garden Use
features: MULTI PURPOSE: A complete all purpose fertiliser with added seaweed extract that brings out the best in your plants
NUTRITIONAL: Boosts healthy root development and ensures maximum nutrient uptake for high quality plants and crops
SUPPORTING FORMULA: Aids strong, healthy growth with a perfectly balanced formula
SUITABLE FOR: Ideal for use on all plants, including flowers, shrubs, trees, fruit and vegetables, in the home, garden, or allotment
EASY TO USE: Concentrate formula ideal for treating large areas of your garden
description: From the manufacturer About Maxicrop The key benefits of Maxicrop - improved root system to take up more soil nutrients and water; greener leaves with more chlorophyll to improve the use of sunlight energy for carbohydrate production; and strong healthy growth - have proven scientifically in many independent trials. And these days, more and more 'Grow Your Own' gardeners are discovering the benefits of Maxicrop, and its 'green credentials. Maxicrop Plus Complete Garden Feed 500ml Maxicrop Complete Garden Feed is a balanced all-purpose seaweed extract based fertiliser for all flowers, shrubs, fruit and trees. A great solution for excellent healthy growth all round the garden, due to its unique double value combination of pure Seaweed Extract plus a balanced NPK Fertiliser. Simple, safe and economical to use as a root drench or foliar spray throughout the growing season.
